rulings.Case Title: JSP BROADWAY, LLC VS. BENJAMIN ALFARO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Vacate Judgment And Recalll Writ Of Possession
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 22, 2011, line 2. Defendant Benjamin Alfaro's motion to vacate judgment and recall writ of possession. Grant, future rent violation is void and stricken. See Little v. Sanchez 166, Cal App 3rd 501. Prevailing party to prepare order. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PACIFIC INSTITUTE, A CALIFORNIA NOT-FOR-PROFIT VS. KAZIM ALTAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees;
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 22, 2011, line 6. Plaintiff Pacific Institute's motion for attorney's fees. Grant attorney fees in amount of $21,721. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NATASHA JAMBOR-SADEGHI VS. JEFFREY HAMRICK et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 22, 2011, line 7. Defendants Jeffrey Hamrick and Jessica Edrosolan's motion for order of dismissal. Off calendar, settled. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NORA CORRASCO VS. EVELYN MONTES DE OCA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Ntc Of Motion And Motion For Atty'S Fees
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 22, 2011, line 8. Defendant Evelyn Montes's motion for attorney's fees. No opposition filed, grant attorney fees in amount of $1,800. per CCP 1717. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NORTHERN CALIFORNIA PRESBYTERIAN HOMES AND VS. CURTIS KELLEY III
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 22, 2011, line 9. Plaintiff Northern California Presbyterian Homes and Services' Amended Motion for Summary Judgment. Hearing required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KAI KWAN YEE VS. INGRID AYERDI et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 22, 2011, line 10 Defendant Inrid Ayerdi's demurrer to complaint. Overruled with five days to answer. Amount sought in notice is limited to rent. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: OLIVA SHEN VS. JEAN PIERRE BELKALEM et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 22, 2011, line 11. Defendant Jean Pierre Belkalem's Motion to Strike. Grant with five days leave to amend complaint paragraph 17F re statement of daily damages. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SOPHIA LIN et al VS. SAM MUAU et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 22, 2011, line 12. Defendants Samuel Muao, Tautalatasi Pasane and Allitasi Muao's Motion to Strike. Off calendar. First amended complaint filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MURPHY INVESTMENTS, INC., A CALIFORNIA VS. JOY LEFCOURT COX et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 22, 2011, line 13. Defendant Joy Lefcourt Cox' demurrer to first amended complaint. Sustained defmurrer to first amended complaint with 5 days leave to amend to allege 1. Management company's authority to sue/agency created by written instruction or 2. Join all owners as plaintiff. Prevailing party to prepare order. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALEJANDRA GARCIA et al VS. RAQUEL HANCOCK
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 22, 2011, line 1. Defendant Raquel Hancock' demurrer to complaint. Off calendar. Case dismissed 11-17-11. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZAHIRA SALEM DBA GRAND SOUTHERN HOTEL VS. NANCY LYAS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 22, 2011, line 3. Defendant Nancy Lyas' motion to set aside default/default judgment/leave to defend. Grant motion to set aside default and default judgment. Defendant to file answer immediately and post November rent. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN HEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. CHRISTINE AGUIRRE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Vacate Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 22, 2011, line 4. Defendant Christine Aguirre's motion to vacate default and default judgment. Grant motion to vacate default and default judgment, defendant to file answer immediately and post rent for October and November. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BEHRINGER HARVARD ARGENTA LLC VS. SAMUEL G. PIERCE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 22, 2011, line 5. Defendant Samuel G. Pierce' motion to quash service of summons or stay or dismiss. Off calendar per moving party. (501/REQ)
